source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

1.description: Ezili curses Bloons with dark voodoo power.

3.description: Heartstopper: allows Purple popping and prevents any regrow from happening for 10 seconds.

4.description: Ezili's main attack now curses multiple Bloons.

6.description: Ezili's attack does far more damage to MOAB-Class Bloons.

7.description: Sacrificial Totem: A totem that gives Camo detection, extra pierce, attack range, attack speed, and projectile speed to nearby Monkeys, especially Wizard Monkeys. Drains 10 lives.

8.description: Damage over time lasts longer and damages faster.

9.description: Ezili's attack strips off Camo, Regrow and Fortified properties from non-MOAB class Bloons.

10.description: MOAB Hex: places a curse on a MOAB-Class Bloon, it takes damage every second until annihilated.

11.description: Increased attack range. Increases pierce of reanimated Bloons by 50%.

12.description: Heartstopper reduced cooldown and increased duration. Deals increased damage to MOABs.

13.description: Base attack has larger splash radius and increased pierce.

15.description: Damage over time lasts longer and damages faster.

16.description: Sacrificial Totem lasts longer and costs only 1 life to use. Main attack removes Camo from DDTs.

17.description: Base attack has larger splash radius and increased pierce.

19.description: Dark voodoo curse pops more layers with each damage tick.

20.description: MOAB Hex works faster and can destroy BAD Bloons.
